response:
这段话整体上是通顺的，表达清晰，但可以稍作润色，使其更加正式和流畅。以下是优化后的版本：

---

As you know, your company has been selected as one of the suppliers for the Centric Brands Packaging Optimization Project. To support this project, we would like to invite you to a training session on June 8th, from 9:30 to 10:30 am, via Microsoft Teams. The training will be conducted in English and is designed to introduce the Centric Brands Compliance System.

---

如果你希望进一步调整语气（例如更正式或更简洁），也可以告诉我，我可以根据你的需求进行调整。
